days.world_headline: Iran begins burying Khamenei with his successor still in hiding, a Category-5 typhoon slams America's Pacific islands, and Mumbai shuts down under torrential rain — as diplomats converge on Ankara to talk about ending the Ukraine war.

The world's oil arteries are the story of the day — the Strait of Hormuz reopens as a wounded Iran buries Khamenei, while Ukraine sets a Russian oil terminal ablaze and Trump phones Putin to talk peace.
days.market_headline: A quiet Sunday with the tape still frozen at last week's closes — but the big change is relief: the Strait of Hormuz is reopening, India has stood down its gas emergency, and the week ahead turns on Indian Q1 earnings, not an oil shock.

days.world_headline: America turns 250 under a deadly heat dome while Iran's threat to charge tolls in the Strait of Hormuz turns oil into the world's biggest wildcard.
days.market_headline: A holiday-weekend lull with the tape frozen at last week's closes — but Iran's Strait of Hormuz toll threat leaves oil (and India) the thing to watch, while Bitcoin quietly firms.

days.world_headline: Russia unleashes its biggest strike yet on Kyiv as Iran buries its assassinated Supreme Leader — while a weak US jobs report quietly flips the world's most important interest-rate question.
days.market_headline: A weak US jobs report kills the rate-hike fear — Dow hits a record and gold jumps, Apple rockets ~5%, while India grinds higher against a soft rupee and record foreign outflows.

days.world_headline: The Fed's new chair strikes a calmer tone as inflation expectations ease — cooling yesterday's rate-hike panic, even as the AI trade wobbles and India's tech stocks roar back.
days.market_headline: Fed's Warsh calms the rate-hike fear as inflation expectations ease — US tech wobbles on AI doubts while India's IT stocks lead a rebound.

days.world_headline: A Middle East energy shock and a fresh inflation scare push the Fed toward rate HIKES — and it reaches all the way to India's pump prices and the rupee.
days.market_headline: Risk-on tape shrugs off a hot core PCE print as AI names lead — but Bitcoin sits deeply oversold near 52-week lows.
